title: ceratosanthes trifoliata
intro: Ceratosanthes trifoliata, also known as the Three-leaved Cerato, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Cucurbitaceae family. It has been traditionally used in medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties, which help to treat a range of health issues. The plant's extracts have been found to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and soothing digestive issues. In herbal preparations, the leaves and roots of Ceratosanthes trifoliata are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
